then.focus_task: Niacinamide serum every morning to refine and unclog pores

because: Consensus r/SkincareAddiction + Byrdie: niacinamide visibly refines pores

then.focus_task: BHA exfoliant 2x a week to clear congestion

because: BHA (salicylic) penetrates oil to clear clogged pores

then.focus_task: Niacinamide AM + retinol a few nights for smoother texture

because: Niacinamide + retinol consensus for texture and pore appearance

then.focus_task: Vitamin C serum every morning for brightness and glow

because: Vitamin C is the most-cited brightening active

then.focus_task: Vitamin C AM + daily SPF to even tone over time

because: Even tone needs antioxidant + UV protection together

then.focus_task: Caffeine eye serum tapped in AM and PM

because: Caffeine constricts vessels to reduce blue under-eye and puffiness

then.focus_task: Caffeine + vitamin C around the eye, SPF daily

because: Pigmented circles respond to brightening + sun protection

then.focus_task: Gua sha drainage 3 min AM, sweep up and toward the ears

because: Lymphatic massage temporarily reduces fluid retention

then.focus_task: Keep added salt low today to reduce facial water retention

because: Sodium drives water retention seen as puffiness

then.focus_task: Gua sha along the jaw + posture reset to define the lower face

because: De-bloat + posture visibly sharpen the jaw without surgery

then.focus_task: Azelaic acid / heartleaf to calm redness and reactivity

because: Azelaic acid is a derm staple for redness and rosacea

then.focus_task: Retinol 2-3 nights a week, buffer with moisturizer

because: Retinoids are the gold standard for fine lines and turnover

then.focus_task: Broad-spectrum SPF 50 every morning (prevention #1)

because: Photoprotection prevents most visible aging

then.focus_task: Peptides at night to support firmness and bounce

because: Peptides support collagen for firmer-looking skin

then.focus_task: Hyaluronic serum on damp skin, then seal with moisturizer

because: HA draws water in; sealing prevents it evaporating

then.focus_task: Ceramide moisturizer AM/PM, pause actives until calm

because: Barrier repair needs ceramides and fewer actives

then.focus_task: PDRN serum to support barrier recovery

because: PDRN is the trending K-beauty repair active

then.focus_task: Glass-hair serum on lengths for mirror shine

because: Glass hair trend: lightweight serums boost shine

then.focus_task: Scalp peptide serum + nightly massage for density

because: Peptide scalp care supports hair density

then.focus_task: Skin tint + cream blush for an even no-makeup glow

because: Latte / no-makeup makeup favors sheer skin tints

then.focus_task: Wear cool-toned colors and silver metals to brighten your face

because: Cool undertones glow in cool palettes

then.focus_task: Wear warm earth tones and gold metals to warm your glow

because: Warm undertones glow in warm palettes
